title: baccharis longii
intro: Baccharis longii, also known as the Long's baccharis or Texas silverling, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which aid in the treatment of various health issues. The plant's medicinal properties have been associated with relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Baccharis longii often include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal benefits.
